title: Craftsman-Star
description: Feel the texture of the mods from the higher version!
body:
# craftsman star

By porting textures from many higher version mods into one texture pack,

players of version 1.12.2 no longer need to download other higher version texture packs, Because downloading too many texture packs makes it messy when adding texture packs.

## Differences from other mods texture porting packages

Modified to be more compatible with higher version textures, integrating more textures.

Craftsman Star will merge with other functional, practical, and aesthetically pleasing resource packs.

Embracing the Minecraft 1.12.2 community and maintaining it extremely well That's why the craftsman star program was created in the first place.

## contribute

Please clone the main Craftsman Star repository at Source code

Please raise PR and questions on Github!

## Porting Higher Version Texture Plans
Complete the list of ported higher version Mods textures

Tinkers' Construct 3

Tinkers' Construct 3 version 1.19.2 [Transplantation Texture completed]
Component textures [not yet ported]

Thermal Series

Thermal Foundation version 1.19.2 [Transplantation Texture completed]
Thermal Integration version 1.18.2 [Transplantation Texture completed]

Tough As Nails

Texture ported version 1.20.4 [Transplantation Texture completed]

Immersive Engineering

Texture ported version 1.20.4 [Transplantation Texture completed]
Finish merging texture packs list

Immersive Engineering

Updated project texture pack from tdstress on curseforge
Texture porting to 1.12.2 plan

Ender IO

Texture ported version 1.20.1 [Active transplantation]

The Twilight Forest

Twilight Forest: JAPPA Pack (official addon)[Active transplantation]

Thermal Series

Thermal Expansion version 1.18.2 [Transplantation in progress]
Thermal Dynamics version 1.18.2 [Transplantation in progress]
After porting the Thermal Expansion version and the Thermal Dynamics version, I gave up on porting them, because Thermal is officially only allowed for private use, not for distribution.

Industrial Craft 2

Texture ported version 1.19.2 [Texture untransplanted]

Applied Energistics 2

Texture ported version 1.19.2 [Texture untransplanted]

That's all for now

## Texture Porting Demonstration ![Tinkers' Construct](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e48ad7ceff73fc69dc030e33cfe2a428201c1a0.png)![Thermal Series](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0385549342a14e197d29b84bba342636f729df6.png)
